title: New parser component from Atom Parser figma spec — document structure viewer with tabbed split panel
description: Read the Atom Parser figma design spec folder. Create a new component (not functionality of extraction) just the sample and layout. Its atom parser. The actual extraction of text is out of scope. Figma layout: header, split panel — left has Parse/Generate/Verify tabs, right has Document Sections/JSON Structure tabs.
resolution: Created parser component: safecontracts type (ParserMetadata, PARSER_DATA_FIELDS, PARSER_DATA_SLOTS), builder (builders/parser.ts — header, split panel with left tabs [Parse/Generate/Verify] and right tabs [Document Sections/JSON Structure], tree view with expand/collapse, field details, bounds, JSON view with copy), registered in all contracts, 2 samples, 8 framework wrappers, SafeRenderer routing. All proves pass.
